languages.text: Взгляд проходит сквозь вас, будто вас вовсе не существует.

traits.locale_text: Взгляд проходит сквозь вас, будто вас вовсе не существует.

languages.text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.
languages.original_text: Взгляд проходит сквозь вас, будто вас вовсе не существует.

traits.locale_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.
Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.
Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

languages.text: Sie schauen durch dich hindurch, als würdest du nicht existieren.
languages.original_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

traits.locale_text: Sie schauen durch dich hindurch, als würdest du nicht existieren.

languages.text: 他们的目光径直穿过你，就好像你根本不存在一样。
languages.original_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

traits.locale_text: 他们的目光径直穿过你，就好像你根本不存在一样。

languages.text: Leurs regards glissent sur vous comme si vous n'existiez pas.
languages.original_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

traits.locale_text: Leurs regards glissent sur vous comme si vous n'existiez pas.

languages.text: Miran a través de ti como si no existieras.
languages.original_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

traits.locale_text: Miran a través de ti como si no existieras.

languages.text: Bakışları sanki hiç yokmuşsun gibi içinden geçip gidiyor.
languages.original_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

traits.locale_text: Bakışları sanki hiç yokmuşsun gibi içinden geçip gidiyor.

languages.text: 彼らの方向は、まるであなたが存在しないかのように、あなたを通り抜ける。
languages.original_text: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.

traits.locale_text: 彼らの方向は、まるであなたが存在しないかのように、あなたを通り抜ける。
